regulations.name: ISO/IEC 27001
regulations.note: Amendment 1 (2024) adds climate-change consideration to clauses 4.1/4.2.

regulations.name: ISO 13485
regulations.note: QMS for medical devices; stable.

regulations.name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework
regulations.note: CSF 2.0 added the GOVERN function and broadened scope beyond critical infrastructure.

regulations.name: NIST SP 800-53
regulations.note: Security & privacy controls catalog.

regulations.name: NIST SP 800-218 (SSDF)
regulations.note: Secure Software Development Framework; basis for federal secure-software attestation.

regulations.name: NIST SP 800-63B
regulations.note: Authenticator assurance. Verify Rev 4 finalization on csrc.nist.gov.

regulations.name: PCI DSS
regulations.note: Only active version since v4.0 retired 31 Dec 2024; future-dated requirements mandatory since 31 Mar 2025.

regulations.name: CVSS
regulations.note: v4.0 adds Attack Requirements and OT/ICS safety metrics; current.

regulations.name: FDA Premarket Cybersecurity / FD&C Act 524B
regulations.note: Final premarket cybersecurity guidance (supersedes 2023); mandatory SBOM, postmarket plan, CVD. Verify latest revision on fda.gov.

regulations.name: FDA QMSR (21 CFR 820)
regulations.note: QMSR aligns 21 CFR 820 with ISO 13485; effective 2 Feb 2026. Re-confirm QMS/record documents.

regulations.name: EU AI Act
regulations.note: In force 1 Aug 2024; remainder applies 2 Aug 2026. Digital Omnibus (provisional agreement May 2026, adoption expected Jul 2026) defers high-risk obligations: Annex III to 2 Dec 2027, Annex I (incl. medical devices) to 2 Aug 2028.

regulations.name: EU Cyber Resilience Act
regulations.note: In force; main obligations apply from ~Dec 2027. Verify phased dates.

regulations.name: ISO/IEC 42001
regulations.note: AI management system standard.

regulations.name: NIST AI RMF
regulations.note: AI risk management framework.

regulations.name: ISO/IEC 27701
regulations.note: Privacy information management extension to 27001.

regulations.name: IEC 62443
regulations.note: Industrial automation & control systems (OT) security.

regulations.name: IEC 62304
regulations.note: Medical device software lifecycle.

regulations.name: IEC 81001-5-1
regulations.note: Health software & health IT security activities in the lifecycle.

regulations.name: SBOM (NTIA min. elements / SPDX / CycloneDX)
regulations.note: Component transparency; required by FDA 524B for cyber devices.

regulations.name: SLSA
regulations.note: Supply-chain levels for software artifacts (build provenance).
